summary: Iteration 20 - Content-Specific Entitlement System Testing. All 9 features tested and verified. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: Gaming Central shows correct unlock badges for authenticated purchasers, game cards display 'Full question bank' text, and Redeem page has 'Go to Game Center' button in success state.
critical_code_review_comments: trivia_game.py: Content-specific entitlement system correctly implemented. _classify_product parses product names for series (holiday_4c, breakfast) and editions (adult, youth). _get_user_entitlements checks payment_transactions and submitted_codes.
trivia_game.py: /entitlements/me endpoint returns series, editions, has_audio, has_instructor, access_level. Admin/instructor roles get full access automatically.
trivia_game.py: /questions/for-game endpoint correctly gates access - demo users get max 10 shared-pool questions, purchasers get full pool for their unlocked series.
GamingCentral.js: Correctly fetches entitlements using soul_food_token and displays unlock badges (Holiday 4C's Unlocked, Break*fast Unlocked, Lesson Audio).
GamingCentral.js: Game cards show 'Full question bank — 4C's, Break*fast' for authenticated purchasers, 'Demo questions — purchase to unlock full bank' for demo users.
RedeemCode.js: Success state includes both 'Go to My Library' and 'Go to Game Center' buttons with correct data-testid attributes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content-specific entitlement system fully tested. Key mappings: Q1 lesson_node prefix = holiday_4c series, Q2/Q3 = breakfast series, empty = shared pool. Demo users capped at 10 shared-pool questions. Admin/instructor roles get full access to all series. Frontend uses soul_food_token for auth. Gaming Central route is /gaming-central (not /game-central).

GET_entitlements_me_no_auth.details: Returns access_level=demo, empty series array, has_audio=false, has_instructor=false

GET_entitlements_me_admin_auth.details: Returns access_level=full, series=[holiday_4c, breakfast], has_audio=true, has_instructor=true

GET_for_game_admin_auth.details: Returns full pool with unlocked_series=[holiday_4c, breakfast, shared]

GET_for_game_multiple_series.details: Admin gets questions from shared + holiday_4c + breakfast series

GET_for_game_demo_shared_only.details: Demo mode only returns shared pool questions (no Q1/Q2/Q3 lesson_node prefix)

gaming_central_unlock_badges.details: Shows 'Holiday 4C's Unlocked', 'Break*fast Unlocked', 'Lesson Audio' badges for authenticated purchasers

gaming_central_full_question_bank.details: Game cards show 'Full question bank — 4C's, Break*fast' for authenticated users

redeem_game_center_button.details: Success state shows both 'Go to My Library' AND 'Go to Game Center' buttons (data-testid: go-to-games-after-claim)
